Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.wd

Class Lemma

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.wd.Lemma
public class Lemma extends Object
A data structure used to store an implication in a form that allows to compare implications and to define a relation of subsumption between implications.

  • Constructor Details

    • Lemma

      public Lemma(Set<Predicate> antecedents, Predicate consequent, Node origin)

  • Method Details

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Indicates whether some other lemma is "equal to" this lemma.

      Two lemmas are equals if they got the same consequents and antecedents.

      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • subsumes

      public boolean subsumes(Lemma other)
      Checks if this lemma subsumes the given one. Subsumption is a partial order on lemmas. A lemma A subsumes another lemma B if and only if they have the same consequent and the antecedents of A are included in the antecedents of B.
      Parameters:
      other - other predicate to test for subsumption
      Returns:
      true iff this predicate subsumes the given predicate

    • setSubsumed

      public void setSubsumed()
      Marks this lemma as subsumed by another lemma.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • addToSet

      public void addToSet(Set<Lemma> set)
      Adds this lemma to the given set, checking for subsumption.
      Parameters:
      set - set to which this lemma is added
